activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence using the correct reporting verb.
activities.prompt: Nadia told that the train was late.

evaluator.answer: Nadia said that the train was late

activities.explanation: Sin una persona como objeto usamos «said».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence using the correct reporting verb.
activities.prompt: Nadia said me that the train was late.

evaluator.answer: Nadia told me that the train was late

activities.explanation: Ante el objeto «me» usamos «told me».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence without “to” after “told”.
activities.prompt: Omar told to us that he was busy.

evaluator.answer: Omar told us that he was busy

activities.explanation: «Told» lleva el objeto directamente, sin «to».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete reported sentence with the correct pronoun.
activities.prompt: Lena said that I was tired.

evaluator.answer: Lena said that she was tired

activities.explanation: El «I» original se refería a Lena y debe convertirse en «she».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence about Leo's former situation with the standard backshift.
activities.prompt: Leo said that he works remotely when he lived in Dublin.

evaluator.answer: Leo said that he worked remotely when he lived in Dublin

activities.explanation: La etapa terminada en Dublín requiere «worked».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete report from yesterday with the correct continuous backshift.
activities.prompt: Yesterday, Maya said that she is waiting outside.

evaluator.answer: Yesterday, Maya said that she was waiting outside

activities.explanation: La espera se sitúa en el contexto pasado de ayer y usa «was waiting».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence with the correct past perfect form.
activities.prompt: Amir said that he had lose the receipt.

evaluator.answer: Amir said that he had lost the receipt

activities.explanation: Después de «had» usamos el participio «lost».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence with the standard backshift from “will”.
activities.prompt: Eva said that she will contact the supplier.

evaluator.answer: Eva said that she would contact the supplier

activities.explanation: «Will» retrocede a «would».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence with the correct modal form.
activities.prompt: Ravi said that he could to repair the lock.

evaluator.answer: Ravi said that he could repair the lock

activities.explanation: Después de «could» usamos infinitivo sin «to».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence with the listener pronoun referring to Leo.
activities.prompt: Mina told Leo that she could help her.

evaluator.answer: Mina told Leo that she could help him

activities.explanation: El oyente Leo se representa con «him».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete report made later, correcting the time reference.
activities.prompt: Carla said that she was busy now.

evaluator.answer: Carla said that she was busy then

activities.explanation: Al informar más tarde, «now» pasa a «then».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete report made days later, correcting future and time references.
activities.prompt: Jon said that he will finish tomorrow.

evaluator.answer: Jon said that he would finish the next day

activities.explanation: «Will» pasa a «would» y «tomorrow» a «the next day».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete report made later, correcting the past time reference.
activities.prompt: Ben said that he had posted the letter yesterday.

evaluator.answer: Ben said that he had posted the letter the day before

activities.explanation: El «yesterday» original pasa a «the day before».

activities.instructions: Rewrite after leaving the site, correcting demonstrative and place.
activities.prompt: Ana said that she kept these tools here.

evaluator.answer: Ana said that she kept those tools there

activities.explanation: Al cambiar lugar, «these/here» pasan a «those/there».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence with the reported form of an obligation.
activities.prompt: Salma said that she musted renew her permit.

evaluator.answer: Salma said that she had to renew her permit

activities.explanation: «Musted» no existe; una obligación reportada usa «had to».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete report, correcting all pronouns and possessives.
activities.prompt: Nora told Amir that I had left your folder on my desk.

evaluator.answer: Nora told Amir that she had left his folder on her desk

activities.explanation: «I/my» se refieren a Nora y «your» a Amir.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete report made later, correcting every changed reference.
activities.prompt: Leo said that I will bring this sample here tomorrow.

evaluator.answer: Leo said that he would bring that sample there the next day

activities.explanation: Cambian pronombre, modal, demostrativo, lugar y tiempo.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete report of a still-true scientific fact using present simple.
activities.prompt: The teacher said that water had frozen at 0°C.

evaluator.answer: The teacher said that water freezes at 0°C

activities.explanation: El hecho general mantiene el presente simple.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the habitual report with a present reporting verb and no backshift.
activities.prompt: Every Monday Mina says that she needed the sales figures by noon.

evaluator.answer: Every Monday Mina says that she needs the sales figures by noon

activities.explanation: Con «says» para una necesidad habitual usamos «needs».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence with correct past perfect negative form.
activities.prompt: The engineers said that they hadn't receive the parts.

evaluator.answer: The engineers said that they hadn't received the parts

activities.explanation: Después de «hadn't» usamos el participio «received».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete report made the following week, correcting every necessary element.
activities.prompt: Priya said Omar that she can't meet you here tomorrow because she has lost my travel card.

evaluator.answer: Priya told Omar that she couldn't meet him there the next day because she had lost her travel card

activities.explanation: Se corrigen reporting verb, modal, pronombres, lugar, tiempo y perfect.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete report, correcting the reporting verb, references and past forms.
activities.prompt: Rosa told that I was checking these figures when my computer stop.

evaluator.answer: Rosa said that she had been checking those figures when her computer stopped

activities.explanation: Se corrigen «said», pronombres y demostrativo; la acción en progreso retrocede y el evento puntual queda en pasado simple.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting both reporting-verb patterns.
activities.prompt: Elena said me that she had left, and I told that Sam she was unavailable.

evaluator.answer: Elena said to me that she had left, and I told Sam that she was unavailable

activities.explanation: Usamos «said to me» y «told Sam that».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete report made later, correcting obligation, demonstrative and time.
activities.prompt: Amina said that she musted submit this form next week.

evaluator.answer: Amina said that she had to submit that form the following week

activities.explanation: «Must» pasa a «had to», «this» a «that» y cambia la referencia semanal.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete report, keeping past perfect and “could” while correcting pronouns and verb forms.
activities.prompt: Marta said me that I had already ate, so I couldn't joined the lunch.

evaluator.answer: Marta told me that she had already eaten, so she couldn't join the lunch

activities.explanation: Se corrigen «told me», pronombres, participio «eaten» e infinitivo «join».
